response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the provided lyrics for 'かくれんぼ' (Kakurenbo). 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the reference lyrics for both the background music in Scene 1 and the live vocal performance in Scene 3. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are tightly anchored to vocal bursts. Scene 1 background vocals are timed to the music playing over the still image. Scene 3 live vocals are timed to Momosuzu Nene's performance on stage. Visual text (song credits) is included during the instrumental break in Scene 3.

subtitles.original: 桃鈴ねね 3D LIVE "Liminal"
subtitles.english: [Visual: Momosuzu Nene 3D LIVE "Liminal"]

subtitles.original: “いっせーのー”
subtitles.english: "One, two, three"

subtitles.original: で鳴り響いたスタートの合図
subtitles.english: the starting signal rang out

subtitles.original: なぞった線で結んだ世界
subtitles.english: In a world connected by traced lines

subtitles.original: 色付けていく ここから
subtitles.english: I'll add color, from here on

subtitles.original: 物心がつく頃 すでに此処にあった
subtitles.english: By the time I was old enough to know better, it was already here

subtitles.original: 僕じゃない誰かの記憶は
subtitles.english: Someone else's memory that isn't mine

subtitles.original: 夕陽とともに蘇る
subtitles.english: Comes back with the sunset

subtitles.original: 古ぼけた絵本を取り出して
subtitles.english: I took out an old picture book

subtitles.original: 落書きの中に1つの答えを見つけた
subtitles.english: And found one answer in the scribbles

subtitles.original: 自分の価値に 目を疑って
subtitles.english: I doubt the value of myself

subtitles.original: どこまでだって 堕ちていけるの
subtitles.english: How far can I fall?

subtitles.original: どこか遠くに 消えてしまいたい
subtitles.english: I want to disappear somewhere far away

subtitles.original: こんな世界じゃ 僕はいらない
subtitles.english: In a world like this, I'm not needed

subtitles.original: カウントダウンは始まっているよ
subtitles.english: The countdown has already begun

subtitles.original: “いっせーのー”で声を上げて
subtitles.english: "One, two, three" raising my voice

subtitles.original: 聴こえてくるんだ 自分の影の長さに気付く
subtitles.english: I can hear it, I notice the length of my own shadow

subtitles.original: もうこんな時間だ
subtitles.english: It's already this time

subtitles.original: 一等星が顔を出した 届きそうで手を伸ばした
subtitles.english: The first magnitude star has appeared, I reached out as if I could reach it

subtitles.original: 次は僕に着いてきなよ どんな暗闇でも
subtitles.english: Next, follow me, no matter what darkness

subtitles.original: (もういいかい？まーだだよ)
subtitles.english: (Are you ready yet? Not yet)

subtitles.original: 幕は上がりだした
subtitles.english: The curtain has begun to rise

subtitles.original: (もういいかい？まーだだよ)
subtitles.english: (Are you ready yet? Not yet)

subtitles.original: 色付けていく ここから
subtitles.english: I'll add color, from here on

subtitles.original: 10年後の僕らはすれ違いばかりで
subtitles.english: Ten years from now, we'll just pass each other by

subtitles.original: 幻想に想いを馳せては
subtitles.english: And while longing for fantasies

subtitles.original: “戻れない”そう思いこんだ
subtitles.english: I became convinced that "I can't go back"

subtitles.original: くたびれた心に追い討ちを
subtitles.english: Adding insult to my tired heart

subtitles.original: あの頃と変わらない夕陽も
subtitles.english: The sunset that hasn't changed since those days

subtitles.original: なんとも思わない
subtitles.english: I don't think anything of it

subtitles.original: 自分を信じ 歩いていければ
subtitles.english: If I could just believe in myself and keep walking

subtitles.original: どこまでだって 昇れるのにな
subtitles.english: I could climb as high as I want, you know

subtitles.original: カットを跨ぐ その空白に 大切なモノ 見落としている
subtitles.english: In that gap that crosses the cut, you're missing something important

subtitles.original: 見つけられないと泣きわめく君へ
subtitles.english: To you who cries and screams that you can't find it

subtitles.original: “いっせーのー”で声を上げて
subtitles.english: "One, two, three" raising my voice

subtitles.original: 聴こえてくるんだ 自分の影の長さに気付く
subtitles.english: I can hear it, I notice the length of my own shadow

subtitles.original: もうこんな時間だ
subtitles.english: It's already this time

subtitles.original: 一等賞で駆け抜ける君
subtitles.english: You running through in first place

subtitles.original: くっついていただけの僕でも
subtitles.english: Even though I was just clinging on

subtitles.original: 君の前を歩けるかな？
subtitles.english: Can I walk in front of you?

subtitles.original: こんな頼りない僕でも
subtitles.english: Even though I'm this unreliable

subtitles.original: 宝箱はホコリをかぶったまま
subtitles.english: The treasure chest remained covered in dust

subtitles.original: 無くした鍵はずっと 君のポケットの中にあった
subtitles.english: The lost key was always in your pocket

subtitles.original: 散らばっていた全てが 今ひとつに重なる
subtitles.english: Everything that was scattered now overlaps into one

subtitles.original: 手を取り 始めよう 僕たちの物語
subtitles.english: Let's take hands and start our story

subtitles.original: 一度はいらないと思った 今なら胸を張れる気がしたんだ
subtitles.english: I once thought I didn't need it, but now I feel like I can hold my head high

subtitles.original: 愛おしくて 掛け声はいつも
subtitles.english: It's so dear to me, the shout is always

subtitles.english: "One, two, three" raising my voice

subtitles.english: I can hear it, I notice the length of my own shadow

subtitles.english: It's already this time

subtitles.english: The first magnitude star has appeared, I reached out as if I could reach it

subtitles.original: 次は僕に着いてきなよ どんな暗闇でも
subtitles.english: Next, follow me, no matter what darkness

subtitles.original: (もういいかい？まーだだよ)
subtitles.english: (Are you ready yet? Not yet)

subtitles.original: 泣きじゃくった声で
subtitles.english: With a voice choked with tears

subtitles.original: 笑う君が見えた
subtitles.english: I could see you laughing
